nodes.label: CONSTANT
nodes.description: Same weight for each point, which will be 1 / N, N being the number of points found in the given distance.

nodes.label: LINEAR
nodes.description: Weight for Point will be 1 - Dist(Point, Center) / SearchDistance.

nodes.label: GAUSSIAN
nodes.description: Weight will be a gaussian distribution.
